items.title: Sharks in the Bahamas test positive for caffeine, painkillers and even cocaine, study finds

items.title: Barbie Dream Fest in Florida to issue refunds after fan complaints
items.dek: Fans, who paid up to $450 (£340), complained of a grey convention centre backdrop and a "swag bag" that included only a plastic pouch with a Barbie hand sanitis
items.body: Fans, who paid up to $450 (£340), complained of a grey convention centre backdrop and a "swag bag" that included only a plastic pouch with a Barbie hand sanitiser.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Most Syrian refugees in Germany expected to return home in three years, Merz says
items.dek: Merz’s government has taken a tougher line on refugees and migrants, amid surging support for the anti-immigration AfD party.
items.body: Merz’s government has taken a tougher line on refugees and migrants, amid surging support for the anti-immigration AfD party.
items.author: IriLine Desk
